title: Banco de España Statistical Bulletin — CPI & Harmonised Price Indices (time series CSV bundle)
time_coverage: long-run historical series through mid-2026 (exact start year varies by series within bundle)
units: described in file / codebook (CSV headers in Spanish)
license_terms: Banco de España public statistics (free reuse per BdE terms)
notes: ZIP bundle of CSV time series for CPI, harmonised CPI, and related price indices from the BdE Statistical Bulletin bulk-download page. CSV column headers are in Spanish; series catalogue/manual at https://www.bde.es/webbe/es/estadisticas/compartido/docs/manual_archivos_csv.pdf explains structure (English translation available per BdE). Contains multiple CSVs (be0105.csv, be2502.csv, si_3_1.csv, be2623.csv, be2501.csv, be2621.csv, etc.), not individually itemized here — see ZIP contents.
